finish: CFS (Clean, Finish, and Stone per note)

views.description: End-on view of the large flange end (left end) showing the circular profile, centerlines, and datum A callout
views.centerline_notes: Crossed centerlines indicate a revolved/cylindrical part. The dashed circle represents the main shaft diameter behind the flange face.

views.description: Full-length side (right-plane) view showing the entire shaft with left flange, main shaft body, right end journal, chamfers/fillets, and all axial dimensions
views.centerline_notes: Horizontal centerline through the entire length confirms fully revolved/cylindrical geometry. Break line in the middle indicates a foreshortened view of a long shaft.

dimensions.notes: Large flange OD shown in front view

dimensions.ambiguity_reason: Could be flange OD or an offset dimension; reads 2.218 horizontally under the flange circle
dimensions.notes: Horizontal linear dimension across flange, likely the full OD or flange face width measured differently; may be the flange OD
.500 CENT. with +.002/-.000 tolerance referencing Datum A — central journal diameter zone

dimensions.ambiguity_reason: Value reads 76.88 but given typical shaft proportions this may be in mm or a very long shaft in inches; likely inches per drawing unit declaration

dimensions.notes: Secondary overall length dimension, slightly shorter than D004 — likely to a shoulder or step
Axial width of the left flange / boss
1.016 TYP — typical axial spacing of a shoulder or step feature
Flange OD labeled in side view, consistent with D001
2.218 dimension repeated in side view, consistent with D002
2.4985 Ø REF ±.0015 — right end journal/flange diameter, reference dimension
.125 R MAX TYP — maximum fillet/undercut radius at shoulders, typical
.06 C/R BOTH ENDS — 0.06 chamfer or radius on both ends of the shaft

features.description: Base shaft body — full-length revolved solid about the centerline axis. Outer profile includes the left flange (Ø1.734, 0.88 wide), main shaft body, and right end journal (Ø2.4985 REF). Total length 76.88 inches.
Left end flange boss — the large circular flange visible in the front view, Ø1.734, axial width 0.88. Datum A surface established here.
Right end journal/flange — Ø2.4985 REF shoulder at right end of shaft. 'Machine Centers Permitted' note applies here.
Shoulder fillets at all diameter transitions — .125 R MAX TYP per note in side view.
.06 C/R BOTH ENDS — 0.06 chamfer or corner radius applied to both ends of the shaft.

symmetry.description: Part is fully axisymmetric about the horizontal centerline axis

concentric_groups.description: All diameters are coaxial about the shaft centerline

warnings: BUILD ORDER NOTE: F001 is listed as revolve (base solid) but the schema requires the first feature to be extrude_boss. This part is clearly a turned/revolved shaft — the revolve IS the base. A revolve is used as the base feature here per geometry; treat F001 as the base revolve.

DIMENSION CHAIN DOES NOT CLOSE: D004 (76.88) vs D005 (75.125) + D006 (0.88) = 76.005. Gap of ~0.875 is unaccounted for. Likely an additional shoulder width or the 75.125 references a different datum than the overall. Human review recommended.

D002/D009 (2.218): It is unclear whether this is the flange OD (which appears larger than 1.734 in the front view circle) or a separate measurement. The front view shows a large circle dimensioned as 1.734Ø but the 2.218 dimension extends further. Could be the flange OD while 1.734 is the shaft body OD.

D003 (.500 CENT.): Interpreted as a .500 diameter centrally-located feature (possibly a center bore or datum zone) with +.002/-.000 tolerance. Context suggests it is the central journal/datum surface diameter.
2.4985 Ø REF ±.0015: The tolerance value of ±.0015 is applied to a REF dimension, which is unusual. May be a limit dimension or a reference to an actual measured range. Human review recommended.
CFS note (Clean, Finish, Stone) applies to the shaft surface in the side view — recorded as finish.
MACHINE CENTERS PERMITTED note at right end — center drill holes are allowable at both ends.
Drawing is hand-drawn/sketched; some dimension values may be slightly misread. Confidence set to 0.82.

Units assumed to be inches based on dimension magnitudes and typical shaft proportions. The 76.88 overall length makes this a very long shaft (~6.4 ft) if in inches — may be mm. If mm, all dimensions should be scaled accordingly. Resolution required from title block.
